productName: Seattle Bubble Works Joint - Hash-Infused Joint - Rainbow Magic (H) - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Rainbow Magic flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
